activities.name: Lokmat HM 2026
activities.description: Rough day on the legs. I was cruising until the 19k mark, but then my calves started cramping up. I had to run-walk the rest of the way, but it was a solid learning experience on a tough route.

activities.name: Intervals
activities.description: 2k warmup + 4 * 100m strides + 4 * (800m at 5k pace + 200m recovery) + 6 * (400m at 5k pace -10seconds + 200m recovery) + 1k cooldown

activities.name: PCHM - 2025
activities.description: So close yet so far ! Missed the sub 2hr target by a minute and half but nevertheless felt good to finish the year on high!

activities.name: Bajaj 10k run
activities.description: Phew! Quite a run. Broke my previous PB in 10k category by 6 minutes and few seconds!

activities.name: Hill Intervals
activities.description: 10min warmup + 4 * 100m strides + 13 * (1min fast uphill + 2min downhill) + 1k cooldown
valid: 13 laps of 1 min uphill with 2 min downhill recovery

activities.name: Intervals
activities.description: 2k warmup + 6 * 100m strides + 14 * 1 min fast with 1 min rest + 1k cooldown
valid: 14 laps of 1 min fast with 1 min rest

activities.name: 10min Warm-up + 4 * 100m strides
valid: 4 laps of 100m strides with 30 sec rest

activities.name: Hill Intervals
activities.description: 2k warmup + 4 * 100m strides + 13 * (1min uphill fast + 2min downhill recovery) + 1k cooldown
valid: 4 laps of 100m strides with 30 sec rest
13 laps of 1 min uphill fast with 2 min downhill recovery
